name: Balance Sheet - Helvetia Vorsorge
description: The scope-computed balance sheet: statement, key figures (funding ratio per BVV2 Art. 44), asset allocation, and the new-entry dialog.
icon: <svg xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg' viewBox='0 0 24 24' fill='none' stroke='currentColor' stroke-width='2'><path d='M12 3v18M5 7l7-4 7 4M5 7v4a7 7 0 0 0 14 0V7'/><path d='M3 21h18'/></svg>

content.commentary: Funding improved year over year: the 2025 funding ratio of ~112.4% exceeds the value-fluctuation-reserve target, leaving free funds intact.
